hypothesis: If the six controllable reactor parameters—bicarbonate temperature, bicarbonate concentration, bicarbonate flow rate, KOH concentration, the second flow rate, and total applied current density—are jointly optimized on the AdaCarbon closed-loop platform using Bayesian optimization with Gaussian process regression and SHAP-guided analysis, then the reactor yield of the reactive carbon electrolyzer will be maximized at a specific parameter set within the tested ranges because the optimization algorithm effectively navigates nonlinear parameter interactions.
